---
title: "Privacy"
title-block-banner: true
subtitle: "March 9, 2026"
author: "Fei Wang, PhD"
format: 
    revealjs:
        theme: theme.scss
        margin: 0.04
        incremental: true  
        code-block-height: 300px
        menu: true
        slide-number: true
execute:
  echo: false
---



{{< include slides/01-intro.md >}}
